kanban: Create a complete, self-contained Todo Kanban board application as a single HTML file (inline CSS + JS, no external dependencies). Requirements: Three columns (To Do, In Progress, Done). Add new tasks with title, description, priority (Low/Medium/High). Drag and drop between columns. Dark theme with CSS variables. LocalStorage persistence. Search/filter tasks. Responsive design. Task count per column. Timestamps. Delete and edit tasks. Animations on drag. Output ONLY raw HTML starting with .
dashboard: Create a complete analytics dashboard as a single HTML file (inline CSS + JS, no external dependencies). Requirements: KPI cards with animated counters (Revenue $847K, Users 12.4K, Orders 3.2K, Growth +24%). Revenue chart using SVG/Canvas. Recent activity feed (10 items). Dark theme. Responsive grid layout. Auto-refresh timer (simulated data updates). Date range filter. Export button. Hover effects on cards. Output ONLY raw HTML starting with .
chess: Create a chess game as a single HTML file with inline CSS+JS, no external dependencies. Requirements: 8x8 board with Unicode pieces. Click piece to select, click square to move. Turn indicator (white/black). Dark theme. New Game button. Captured pieces display. Move history. Highlight selected piece and valid moves. Check detection with visual indicator. Output ONLY raw HTML starting with .
markdown: Create a markdown editor with live preview as a single HTML file (inline CSS+JS, no external dependencies). Requirements: Split-pane layout (editor left, preview right). Formatting toolbar (bold, italic, heading, link, list, code). Live preview that parses markdown (headings, bold, italic, links, lists, code blocks, blockquotes). Dark theme. Default sample content. Word count. Copy markdown button. Responsive (stack on mobile). Output ONLY raw HTML starting with .
calculator: Create a calculator app as a single HTML file (inline CSS+JS, no external dependencies). Requirements: CSS grid button layout (0-9, +, -, *, /, =, C, CE, %, +/-, decimal). Display showing current input and expression history. Chain operations (5+3*2=16). Dark theme. Keyboard support for all operations. Error handling (divide by zero). Backspace button. Memory functions (M+, M-, MR, MC). Responsive. Output ONLY raw HTML starting with .
snake: Create a Snake game as a single HTML file (inline CSS+JS, no external dependencies). Requirements: Canvas-based game area. Arrow key controls. Score display. Speed increases with score. Game over on wall/self collision with restart. Food spawning. High score saved to localStorage. Dark theme. Start screen. Grid overlay. Touch controls (swipe). Output ONLY raw HTML starting with .
pomodoro: Create a Pomodoro timer app as a single HTML file (inline CSS+JS, no external dependencies). Requirements: Circular SVG progress ring showing time remaining. Work (25min) / Short Break (5min) / Long Break (15min) modes. Start/Pause/Reset controls. Session counter. Audio notification when timer ends (use Web Audio API beep). Settings to customize durations. Dark theme. Animated progress ring. Auto-switch between work/break. Output ONLY raw HTML starting with .
weather: Create a weather dashboard as a single HTML file (inline CSS+JS, no external dependencies). Requirements: Current weather card with temp, humidity, wind, conditions (use hardcoded fake data for Prague). 5-day forecast row. SVG temperature chart showing daily highs/lows. Weather condition icons (sun, cloud, rain - draw with SVG/CSS). Toggle Celsius/Fahrenheit. Dark theme. Responsive. Air quality indicator. Sunrise/sunset times. Output ONLY raw HTML starting with .
password: Create a password generator app as a single HTML file (inline CSS+JS, no external dependencies). Requirements: Password length slider (8-64). Toggles for uppercase, lowercase, numbers, symbols. Generated password display with copy button. Strength meter (weak/medium/strong/very strong) with color bar. Generate button. History of last 10 generated passwords. Character count. Dark theme. Exclude ambiguous characters option. Entropy bits display. Output ONLY raw HTML starting with .
gta: Create a top-down GTA-style game as a single HTML file (inline CSS+JS, no external dependencies). Requirements: Top-down city map with roads, buildings, and sidewalks rendered on canvas. Player character that walks with WASD controls. Cars parked on roads that player can enter/exit with E key - driving changes speed and controls to arrow keys. Police wanted system with 1-5 stars - hitting NPCs or cars increases wanted level. Police cars chase when wanted. Minimap in corner. Health bar. Money that drops from destroyed objects. NPC pedestrians walking on sidewalks. Dark theme with neon city aesthetic. Score display. Game over screen with restart. Output ONLY raw HTML starting with .
webos: Create a web-based operating system desktop as a single HTML file (inline CSS+JS, no external dependencies). Requirements: Desktop with draggable icon grid (My Computer, Recycle Bin, Notepad, Calculator, Browser, Terminal, Settings, Pictures). Taskbar at bottom with Start button, running apps, system tray with clock. Start menu with app list and shutdown button. Window management - windows are draggable, resizable, have minimize/maximize/close buttons, can overlap with z-order. Notepad app: textarea with File menu (New, Open, Save to localStorage). Calculator app: basic calculator in a window. Terminal app: simulated command prompt that responds to 'help', 'date', 'echo', 'clear', 'ls' commands. Right-click context menu on desktop. Dark theme. Boot animation on load. Output ONLY raw HTML starting with .
